parts.name: Pxyl/tet
parts.description: Pxyl/tet: the TetR-repressible / anhydrotetracycline (aTc)-inducible promoter of the Staphylococcus aureus pRAB expression vectors (Helle et al. 2011). A consensus sigma-70/sigma-A -35 (TTGACA) / -10 (TATAAT) promoter carrying two Tn10 tet operators (the O2/O1 tandem) - one in the -35/-10 spacer and one downstream of the -10 - so bound TetR occludes RNA polymerase until aTc relieves repression. Sequence of record: pRAB11 (GenBank JN635500.1).

parts.name: T7 g10 leader
parts.description: T7 gene-10 (g10) translational leader / RBS: epsilon enhancer + Shine-Dalgarno (AAGGAG) + spacer; drives strong translation in the T7 expression system. Extracted from pET-28a (Addgene 249430), the RBS/leader between the XbaI site and the start ATG (35 bp). DNA 5'UTR element, distinct from the T7-tag peptide (see T7_tag).
